hooks.command: cd /data/data/com.termux/files/home/GITIEWALL && git add . && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "auto: update" && git push 2>/dev/null || true

cd /data/data/com.termux/files/home/GITIEWALL && git add . && git diff --cached --quiet || { FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -5 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ *$//'); git commit -m "auto: $FILES" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
